Common.title: Human Unity
Common.searchPlaceholder: Search for t-shirts, hoodies, bottoms, outerwear...

hero.subtitle: A Streetwear Movement — Inspired by Unity
hero.title: WE ARE MORE CONNECTED THAN WE THINK.
hero.description: HUMAN.UNITY is a contemporary streetwear brand built around a simple idea: human connection beyond borders, cultures, religions, and social divisions.

categories.title: Explore the Collections
categories.subtitle: Monochrome basics, technical outerwear, and heavy fleece streetwear.

bestsellers.title: New Drops & Bestsellers
bestsellers.subtitle: Limited edition streetwear staples designed for daily wear.

brandStory.title: Human Unity Movement
brandStory.subtitle: Connecting through creativity & culture
brandStory.description: HUMAN.UNITY combines fashion, art, photography, and storytelling to spark meaningful conversations. Our collections act as physical mediums for unity, awareness, and positive social impact.

wholesaleCTA.title: Boutique & Retail Partners
wholesaleCTA.subtitle: Global shipping & exclusive retail pricing for concept stores
wholesaleCTA.description: Interested in stocking HUMAN.UNITY in your retail store or boutique? Apply for a retail partner account to access custom rates and preview upcoming drops.

Checkout.title: Finalize order
Checkout.successSubtitle: Thank you for your purchase. We have sent you a confirmation message.
Checkout.whatsappConfirmDesc: Click below to instantly confirm your order with our sales team on WhatsApp.

Wholesale.title: Partnership Area
Wholesale.applySubtitle: Get access to retail pricing and bulk ordering
Wholesale.pendingDesc: Your retail partner application has been received and is under review. We will contact you within 24 to 48 hours.
Wholesale.approvedDesc: Welcome to your partner workspace. You can now place orders at boutique prices.
